calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between George P. Scott, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - GEORGE P. SCOTT, TEL. NO. 1-415-368-1753, PETITIONER;
ATTY. PAUL M. GELB OF DRINKER, BIDDLE & REATH LLP, TEL. NO. 1-310-203-4028 APPEARING BY TELEPHONE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER GEORGE SCOTT'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between George P. Scott, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq. is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. The court to look at the order submitted by the moving party. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ru
